title: Global: Klarna partners with global technology company Wacom
full_text:
U.S.

3. November 2016 – Today we are proud to announce a new partnership with global technology company Wacom® that further accelerates Klarna’s expansion in the U.S. Wacom is now bringing our simple retail financing solution to the world of creative interface technology and software.

Financing a purchase over time has historically been optimized for brick and mortar stores. But the online equivalent can often be an ordeal, with redirects, lengthy forms and unclear information. Our process only requires a few fields of information, and lets consumers know instantly if they qualify for the financing solution.

By improving the user experience and offering consumers more flexible payment options, we help retailers and merchants of all sizes counteract the dropped basket effect, boosting retention, loyalty and sales.

Starting today, Wacom’s users can take advantage of our simple financing option.
